actions.name: GetAccountActivity
actions.description: Grants permission to get a specific activity record

actions.name: GetAccountPlanState
actions.description: Grants permission to get all of the information related to the state of the account plan related to Free Tier

actions.name: GetFreeTierAlertPreference
actions.description: Grants permission to get free tier alert preference (email address)

actions.name: GetFreeTierUsage
actions.description: Grants permission to get free tier usage limits and MTD usage status

actions.name: ListAccountActivities
actions.description: Grants permission to list available activities

actions.name: PutFreeTierAlertPreference
actions.description: Grants permission to set free tier alert preference (email address)

actions.name: UpgradeAccountPlan
actions.description: Grants permission to trigger an upgrade of account plan
